examples.text: حَجًّا مَبْرُورًا وَسَعِْيًا مَشْكُورًا وَذَنْبًا مَغْفُورًا
examples.english: May Allah accept your Hajj, reward you for your efforts and grant you forgiveness.

senses.gloss: passive participle of غَفَرَ (ḡafara); forgiven, pardoned
passive participle of غَفَرَ (ḡafara); deceased (wishing him forgiveness for his sins) (always used with the preposition لِ (li))

etymology.text: Derived from the passive participle of the verb غَفَرَ (ḡafara, “to forgive”).
